commitIdentityProof: build-log line: Cloning github.com/WarHawk0097/CodeOutfitters (Branch: main, Commit: 2508a99)

defects.summary: Hero channel tabs lacked ARIA tab semantics
FAQ accordions (6 separate implementations) lacked aria-controls linking trigger to panel
No mobile/tablet navigation menu below 960px — functional defect, not just accessibility gap
defects.fixDetails: Added hamburger toggle + full-screen drawer with focus trap, Escape-to-close, body scroll lock, focus return to trigger

localRegression.failExplanation: Test-selector ambiguity (matched .services-how-toggle instead of FAQ button), not a product defect; verified directly with targeted selector

contactForm.backendUnavailableNoticeObserved: Preview form — no backend connected. Your details were not sent. Email hello@codeoutfitters.ai for a real reply within one business day.
